description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular form. The exterior is clad in light-colored horizontal siding, punctuated by large, black-framed windows that provide ample natural light to the interior. The front facade features a prominent arched double-door entryway, flanked by two potted plants, and several symmetrically arranged windows. The rear of the house includes a set of French doors leading to what could be a patio or backyard area. The roof is flat and appears to have skylights or open sections, suggesting a focus on maximizing daylight. The overall design is minimalist, with a focus on geometric lines and functional spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large black-framed windows, and a prominent arched entryway. The exterior is light-colored with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched double-door entryway, two potted plants, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the horizontal siding, several windows, and the depth of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with French doors, additional windows, and a clear view of the flat roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows and the continuation of the flat roof and siding.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Arched double-door entry with flanking potted plants, no porch or overhang, and minimal decorative elements
